_comment: W5 (G6): clinician-extendable therapy-term glossary. Injected into the Khaleeji translation prompt so CBT/ACT/DBT technique names render as clinically sensible Arabic instead of literal mistranslations (e.g. grounding -> 'للتواصل مع الأرض' = connecting-with-the-earth). Data only: edit here, no code change. Renderings are an eng-provided starter set, clinician-correctable.

terms.note: NOT 'للتواصل مع الأرض' (connecting with the earth)
keep the numerals; it is the sensory grounding count
DBT acronym; keep TIPP, add the plain-language gloss
scheduled-worry technique, not literal 'time of worry'
